semantic.role: Architectural contract definition for a project component in the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Define the component's architectural role within ArchSpine
List specific responsibilities the component must fulfill
Document invariants and out-of-scope boundaries to prevent architectural drift
May include architecture diagrams (Mermaid) and additional sections for clarity
outOfScope: Implementation details not covered by this contract
Cross-cutting concerns assigned to other components
Dynamic runtime behavior beyond the component's scope

English.purpose: This document serves as the canonical specification for a project component within ArchSpine, establishing its architectural role, responsibilities, and boundaries.
English.context_and_audience: Architects, developers, and AI agents maintaining the ArchSpine mirror system use this document to understand the component's contract and ensure consistency across the mirrored project.
key_takeaways: Each component has a defined role and set of responsibilities
Invariants and out-of-scope items prevent scope creep and architectural drift
The document can include diagrams and extra sections for added clarity

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档作为 ArchSpine 镜像系统中项目组件的规范说明，定义其架构角色、职责和边界。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: ArchSpine 镜像系统的架构师、开发者和 AI 代理使用本文档了解组件的契约，确保整个镜像项目的一致性和完整性。
key_takeaways: 每个组件都有明确的角色和职责集合
不变项和范围外项防止范围蔓延和架构漂移
文档可包含图表和额外部分以增加清晰度
